message:
fix: wire ListModels into TUI embedded server, tighten OpenAI filter

The TUI's embedded server never called SetListModelsFunc, causing
/model to return 503. Also broadened the OpenAI model filter to
exclude audio, realtime, transcribe, image, moderation, tts, and
sora models.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
